nasb.text: He set the altar of burnt offering before the doorway of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, and offered on it the burnt offering and the meal offering, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And he set the altar of burnt offering at the entrance of the tabernacle of the tent of meeting, and offered on it the burnt offering and the grain offering, as the Lord had commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 把燔祭壇安放在會幕的帳幕門口，把燔祭和素祭獻在壇上；是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 在会幕，即圣幕入口的前面设立燔祭坛，在坛上献燔祭和素祭，都遵照耶和华的吩咐。
